stories.title: FIA April 20 Vote — Six Days to Shape Miami

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
6 days until the FIA votes on fixing F1 2026 energy management.

Super clip: 250kW → 350kW. Straight mode opened up. ICE contribution increase.

If it passes, Miami becomes the most technically unpredictable race of the decade. #F1Fanrecap #F1 #Formula1

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
F1's energy problem explained:

Cars are "confusing themselves." Leclerc came off throttle in China qualifying and burned energy in the wrong place.

April 20 vote. Miami deadline. This is the most important regulation meeting of the 2026 season. #F1Fanrecap #F12026

article.headline: Six Days, Six Fixes: The FIA Vote That Could Transform F1 2026 Before Miami

image_concepts.label: Image 1B

stories.title: Antonelli Expects Ferrari to Close the Gap Via ADUO Tweak

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Kimi Antonelli told Autosport he EXPECTS Ferrari to close on Mercedes in Miami.

The reason? The ADUO regulation tweak from the April 20 vote.

When the championship LEADER warns the title's getting tighter — pay attention. #F1Fanrecap #F12026 #Formula1

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Antonelli on Miami: "It's going to be a restart for me."

He's 9 points clear of Russell. Leads Ferrari's Leclerc by 23.

But he knows the ADUO rule changes could shift the balance. This title isn't decided yet. #F1Fanrecap #Formula1

article.headline: Antonelli's Warning: The Championship Leader Expects Ferrari to Close in Miami

stories.title: Red Bull's 'Make or Break' Miami Upgrade — What Mekies Is Promising

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Red Bull's situation heading into Miami:

• ~1 second per lap deficit
• 16 Constructors points (6th)
• Major RB22 upgrade QUESTIONED after Suzuka
• Verstappen exit clause: August-October

Mekies says they'll go deeper in data. It has to work. #F1Fanrecap #RedBull #F12026

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
Red Bull went from 4x champion to 6th in the Constructors in ONE season.

The April break is their last real chance before Verstappen's exit window opens.

Miami has to be different. #F1Fanrecap #Verstappen #Formula1

article.headline: Red Bull's Final Gamble: Everything Rides on the Miami RB22 Package

stories.title: Verstappen's Nurburgring Redemption — Four Days to the 24H Qualifiers

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Max Verstappen is back at the Nurburgring in 4 days.

Two four-hour races. Verstappen Racing Mercedes GT3. Lucas Auer as co-driver.

Last time he was there his NLS2 win was stripped. Time for redemption. #F1Fanrecap #Verstappen #Nurburgring

article.headline: Verstappen Returns to the Ring: Redemption Runs Begin Saturday at the 24H Qualifiers

stories.title: Miami GP Preview — 17 Days That Will Define the 2026 Season

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
17 days until Miami GP. The race where:

• F1's first sprint weekend of 2026
• New energy rules debut (if FIA vote passes)
• Red Bull MUST deliver
• Antonelli defends under real pressure

May 1-3. The 2026 season truly begins again. #F1Fanrecap #MiamiGP #Formula1

article.headline: 17 Days to Miami: The Race That Will Define the Real 2026 F1 Season

## Flags
- Mekies quotes: from PlanetF1/single source — include with attribution rather than direct quotes
- Antonelli ADUO quote: Autosport single source — present as "told Autosport" attribution
- Verstappen exit clause: treat as HIGH (multiple prior pipeline sessions confirmed)
- Red Bull 1s deficit breakdown: HIGH (confirmed across multiple sessions and sources)
